title: LifeSmart In-wall Air Quality Detector(ZigBee) PMT300-S-ZTN
description:
Work with Smart Station is an air quality monitoring terminal that can be equipped with optional PM2.5 sensor, temperature and humidity sensor.
It can be widely used in scenarios such as residential, commercial and industrial places, and can effectively improve air quality and create a healthy, comfortable,
efficient, environmentally friendly and energy-saving living and working environment.
Adapter: AC  100-240V | Packaging: English | EAN: 6932046203876 | HS code: 8531100000
